def positive_regex_pattern_with_catastrophic_backtracking_applied_to_unbounded_input():
    rule_id = "regex_pattern_with_catastrophic_backtracking_applied_to_unbounded_input"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Regular expression containing nested quantifiers applied to user-supplied unbounded input."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
